patch:
--- a/multiplexer.v
+++ b/multiplexer.v
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 module mux_8bit(
   input [7:0] data_in_a,
   input [7:0] data_in_b,
   input [7:0] data_in_c,
   input [1:0] sel,
   output reg [7:0] mux_out
 );
 
-  always @(sel) begin
+  always @(sel or data_in_a or data_in_b or data_in_c) begin
     case(sel)
       2'b00: mux_out = data_in_a;
       2'b01: mux_out = data_in_b;
